statement.en: Exploring the experiences of previously incarcerated individuals : stigma, power, and nursing care in correctional settings
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission cannot be evaluated on truth/falsehood grounds because the abstract is embargoed and unavailable. This is an observation-impossible condition—no propositional content exists for assessment. The thesis title indicates qualitative social research (nursing, stigma, incarceration) which is inherently non-truth-evaluable as empirical claims until full disclosure. Classification as ZERO reflects the epistemic void, not a judgment on the work's merit.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 社会的烙印という壁が、ケアの統合を無限に遠ざける。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの円が重なる瞬間——排除と癒しの交差点で光が生まれる。
